capture_modes.label: Summary
capture_modes.use_when: default first pass on noisy targets
behavior: capture only request identity, function name, status, and compact field summaries
avoid raw payload logging unless a request or hook already matches the target window
prefer hook summaries over full argument dumps

capture_modes.label: Priority
capture_modes.use_when: one or two candidate surfaces are already known
behavior: include selected arguments or cookie deltas for matching surfaces

capture_modes.label: Incremental
capture_modes.use_when: iterating on a target after a baseline hook pass already exists
behavior: capture only new or changed surfaces
compare against prior hook profile findings

presets.label: Fetch Signature
presets.use_when: request signing happens around fetch or wrapper functions built on top of fetch

presets.label: XHR Body
presets.use_when: legacy sites or libraries build the protected request through XMLHttpRequest

presets.label: JSONP Insert
presets.use_when: the target request is a script insertion or jQuery jsonp flow

presets.label: Cookie Write
presets.use_when: the user asks how a cookie is generated or a request clearly depends on cookie state

presets.label: Storage Bootstrap
presets.use_when: tokens or seeds are persisted in localStorage or sessionStorage before request construction

presets.label: Crypto Surface
presets.use_when: signatures or encrypted fields are not readable from the request builder alone

presets.label: Business Function
presets.use_when: a likely business helper or request builder function has already been identified
